title: Arts & Crafts Compatibility
description: Adds compatibility between other mods and Arts & Crafts! Who doesn't like mods that work together flawlessly?
body:
# About
This mod adds Compatibility between other mods and Arts & Crafts. This will help mods feel more complete when paired with my mod Arts & Crafts!

I will continue to add more support for other mods so feel free to leave some suggestions in the comments!

# Compatibility List
- [Twigs [Forge & Fabric Compat]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/twigs)
- [Decorative Blocks [Forge & Fabric Compat]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/decorative-blocks)
- [Farmer's Delight [Forge & Fabric Compat]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight)
- [Gilded Sherds [Forge & Fabric Compat]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gilded-sherds)
- [Built [Forge & Fabric Compat]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/built)
- [Spawn [Forge & Fabric Compat]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spawn-mod)
- [Alex's Caves [Forge Only Compat]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-caves)
- [Ecologics [Forge & Fabric Compat]]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ecologics])
- [Yapping Tooltips [Fabric Only Compat]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/yapping-tooltips)
- [Dramatic Doors [Forge & Fabric Compat]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dramatic-doors)
- [Excessive Building [Fabric Compat]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/excessive-building)
- [El and L's Dye Mod [Fabric Only Compat]](https://modrinth.com/mod/el-and-ls-dye-mod)
